title: Browser-based task manager with persistence
description: Build a browser-based task manager app with add/edit/delete tasks, localStorage persistence, filter by status, and a responsive UI. Verify with browser automation.
hidden_tests: add a task and verify it persists after reload
edit a task and verify the change is saved
delete a task and verify it is removed
filter by completed status shows only completed tasks
empty state is shown when no tasks match the filter
